channel.title: Statistics on jamesm.blog
channel.description: Recent content in Statistics on jamesm.blog

item.title: The Causal Inference Comeback: Why Correlation-Era ML Hit a Wall
item.description: Causal inference - the methodological tradition that asks 'why' rather than 'what' - is having a quiet renaissance in 2026 as the limits of correlation-based machine learning have become harder to ignore. A look at what has changed, what the practical methods are, and why this matters for anyone using data to make decisions.
